name: Tectonic Brand
text: Target creature gains Trample, First Strike, and Taunt permanently

name: Living Stone
text: Target creature gains "this creature's keywords cannot be removed" permanently

name: World Anchor
text: Persistent. 0/4. All keywords on friendly creatures cannot be removed or negated

name: Void Enchant
text: Target creature gains "creatures killed by this are exiled instead of going to the graveyard" and "this creature's keywords cannot be removed" permanently

name: Entropy
text: All enemy creatures lose all keywords and all abilities permanently

name: Mirror Image
text: Create a 1/1 copy of target creature (no abilities)

name: Echo
text: Copy target spell you just played

name: Duplicate
text: Create a copy of target creature with cost 2 or less

name: Phantom Double
text: Create a copy of target creature. Destroy it at end of turn

name: Split
text: Target creature becomes two with half stats (rounded down)

name: Mirage Army
text: Create 1/1 copies of up to 3 creatures (no abilities)

name: Shadow Clone
text: Create a 1/1 copy of target creature (no abilities). Destroy it at end of turn

name: Dark Reflection
text: Create a copy of target creature with cost 2 or less. It has -1 health

name: Shade
text: Create a 1/1 Shadow token. When it dies, deal 1 damage to any target

name: Shadow Step
text: Target creature cannot be targeted by attacks this turn

name: Umbral Echo
text: Copy target spell you just played. The copy deals 1 less damage or gives 1 less buff

name: Shadow Puppet
text: Create a 1/1 copy of target enemy creature (no abilities) under your control

name: Creeping Darkness
text: Target enemy creature gets -1 attack this turn. Create a 1/1 Shadow token

name: Dusk Veil
text: Target creature cannot be targeted by spells this turn

name: Shadow Army
text: Create 1/1 Shadow copies of up to 2 friendly creatures (no abilities). Destroy them at end of turn

name: Eclipse
text: All enemy creatures get -1 attack this turn. Create a 1/1 Shadow token for each enemy creature

name: Copycat
text: Create a 1/1 copy of target enemy creature (no abilities) under your control

name: Mimic Form
text: Reaction: When DM plays a creature, create a 1/1 copy of it under your control

name: Steal Spell
text: Reaction: When DM casts a spell, copy it. You choose the new targets

name: Absorb Identity
text: Target friendly creature becomes a copy of target enemy creature. Same stats, same abilities

name: Doppelganger
text: Create a copy of target enemy creature with full stats and abilities. Destroy it at end of turn

name: Impostor
text: Create a copy of target enemy creature with cost 3 or less. Full abilities

name: Turncoat
text: Reaction: When an enemy creature attacks, create a 1/1 copy of it that blocks the attack

name: Adaptive Clone
text: Create a copy of target creature that just died this turn under your control. Half stats, full abilities

name: Mirror Match
text: Reaction: When DM plays a creature with cost 4+, create a copy of it under your control with half stats

name: Identity Theft
text: Take control of target enemy creature until end of turn. It gains Haste

name: Decoy
text: Create a 0/1 Phantasm token with Taunt. When it takes any damage, destroy it

name: False Army
text: Create three 0/1 Phantasm tokens with Taunt. When they take any damage, destroy them

name: Illusory Giant
text: Create a 5/1 Phantasm creature. When it takes any damage, destroy it

name: Phantom Threat
text: Reaction: When DM declares an attack on a friendly creature, redirect it to a 0/1 Phantasm token that is destroyed on hit

name: Veil of Illusions
text: Reaction: When a friendly creature would take lethal damage, replace it with a 0/1 Phantasm token. Return the original to your hand

name: Bait and Switch
text: Create a 0/1 Phantasm token with Taunt. Return target friendly creature to its owner's hand

name: Phantasmal Armor
text: Target creature gains +3 health. If this creature is targeted by a spell, remove the bonus instead

name: Frightful Presence
text: Create a 4/1 Phantasm creature with Taunt. When it takes any damage, destroy it

name: Smoke and Mirrors
text: Reaction: Negate target spell. Create a 0/1 Phantasm token

name: Mass Hallucination
text: All enemy creatures attack random targets this turn instead of chosen targets

name: Lucid Copy
text: Create a copy of any creature in any graveyard with full stats and abilities

name: Dream Walk
text: Reaction: When a friendly creature would die, create a copy of it with 1 health. It enters play at start of your next turn

name: Nightmare
text: Create a copy of the strongest creature on the DM's board. It has Haste. Destroy it at end of turn

name: Sleeper Agent
text: Look at the top 5 cards of the DM's deck. Create a copy of a creature found there with half stats

name: Waking Dream
text: Create copies of up to 2 friendly creatures with full stats and abilities. Destroy them at end of your next turn

name: Dream Eater
text: Reaction: When DM plays a creature, create a copy of it under your control. Destroy whichever copy has less health at end of turn

name: Recurring Nightmare
text: Persistent. 0/3. At start of your turn, create a 1/1 copy of a random creature in any graveyard (no abilities)

name: Shared Dream
text: Target ally draws a card. Create a copy of a creature in that ally's hand with half stats. Destroy it at end of turn

name: Figment
text: Reaction: When a friendly illusion or copy is destroyed, create a 1/1 copy of it

name: Dreamscape
text: Persistent. 0/4. All copies and illusions you create gain +1/+1 and don't expire at end of turn

name: Perfect Illusion
text: Create a permanent copy of any creature on the board or in any graveyard. Full stats, full abilities. This copy cannot be dispelled or exiled. It is real

name: Rewrite Reality
text: Target friendly creature becomes an exact copy of any creature on the board. Permanent. It retains all equipment

name: Nullify
text: Reaction: Negate target creature's ability

name: Spell Shield
text: Target creature can't be targeted until end of turn

name: Deny
text: Reaction: Negate target spell

name: Warding Circle
text: Persistent. Up to 2 creatures can't be targeted by enemy spells

name: Reflect
text: Reaction: Negate target spell and deal 2 damage to caster

name: Foresight
text: Look at the top 3 cards of the DM's deck. Draw a card

name: Mind Ward
text: Target creature cannot be targeted by spells until end of turn

name: Premonition
text: Reaction: When a friendly creature would take damage, reduce it by 2

name: Clarity
text: Draw a card. Look at the top card of the DM's deck

name: Mystic Barrier
text: Give all friendly creatures Shield 1

name: Sixth Sense
text: Reaction: Negate target spell that targets a creature

name: Calm Mind
text: Remove all negative effects from target creature

name: Aura Reading
text: Look at the DM's hand

name: Forewarn
text: Reaction: Negate target spell. Look at the top 2 cards of the DM's deck

name: Prescience
text: Until your next turn, all friendly creatures take 1 less damage from all sources

name: Dark Ward
text: Reaction: Negate target spell. Lose 2 player HP

name: Demonic Pact
text: Reaction: Negate target spell. Discard a card. Draw 2 cards

name: Infernal Shield
text: Reaction: Target creature takes no damage from this attack. Lose 1 player HP

name: Hellfire Counter
text: Reaction: Negate target spell. Deal 3 damage to the caster. Lose 2 player HP

name: Soul Bargain
text: Sacrifice a creature. Reaction: Negate target spell

name: Blood Seal
text: Reaction: Negate target creature's ability. That creature gets -2/-2 permanently. Lose 1 player HP

name: Forbidden Knowledge
text: Reaction: When DM draws cards, look at them. Choose one and discard it. Lose 2 player HP

name: Fiend's Embrace
text: Target creature cannot be destroyed until your next turn. At your next turn, lose player HP equal to the creature's mana cost

name: Abyssal Banishment
text: Reaction: When DM plays a creature, exile it. Lose player HP equal to its mana cost

name: Binding Contract
text: Persistent. 0/2. Once per DM turn, you may negate a spell by losing 3 player HP

name: Blessed Ward
text: Reaction: Reduce damage to target creature by 3

name: Sanctify
text: Target creature cannot be targeted by DM spells until your next turn

name: Holy Ground
text: Persistent. 0/3. All friendly creatures take 1 less damage from all sources

name: Purifying Light
text: Remove all negative effects from target creature. Restore 1 health

name: Sacred Shield
text: Reaction: Target creature gains Shield 4

name: Divine Intervention
text: Reaction: When a friendly creature would die, it survives with 1 health instead. It gains Shield 2

name: Consecrate
text: Reaction: When DM plays a persistent or tower, return it to the DM's hand

name: Hallowed Circle
text: Persistent. 0/2. Reaction: Once per DM turn, reduce damage to player HP by 3

name: Banishing Light
text: Reaction: When DM plays a creature with cost 3 or less, return it to the DM's hand

name: Absolution
text: Restore 4 player HP. All friendly creatures gain Shield 1

name: Divine Rejection
text: Reaction: Negate target spell. The DM loses mana equal to that spell's cost

name: Smite
text: Reaction: When an enemy creature attacks, destroy it if its attack is 4 or less

name: Heavenly Aegis
text: Target creature gains "cannot be destroyed" until your next turn

name: Wrath
text: Reaction: When player HP takes damage, deal that much damage to all enemy creatures

name: Sacred Seal
text: Persistent. 0/4. The DM's spells cost 1 more to play

name: Judgment
text: Reaction: When DM plays a creature with cost 5+, deal 5 damage to it

name: Radiant Shield
text: Reaction: Negate all damage to player HP this attack. Deal 2 damage to the attacker

name: Inviolable
text: Reaction: Target creature cannot be targeted or damaged by anything until your next turn

name: Divine Authority
text: Persistent. 0/3. Once per DM turn, you may negate a creature's ability without paying mana

name: Covenant
text: Reaction: When a friendly persistent or tower would be destroyed, negate the destruction. Lose 2 player HP

name: Eldritch Seal
text: Persistent. 0/6. Reaction: Exile target creature, persistent, or tower. Exile Eldritch Seal. Can only be used once

name: Outer Gate
text: Reaction: At the start of the DM's turn, the DM cannot untap their mana this turn. Exile this card

name: Empower
text: Target creature gets +2/+2 this turn
